message: CI remove hardcoded Bun version pins

files.patch:
@@ -18,8 +18,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
-        with:
-          bun-version: 1.3.10
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
@@ -40,8 +38,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
-        with:
-          bun-version: 1.3.10
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
@@ -69,8 +65,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
-        with:
-          bun-version: 1.3.10
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile

@@ -44,8 +44,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
-        with:
-          bun-version: 1.3.10
 
       - name: Setup Node.js (for npm publish)
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4

@@ -78,8 +78,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
-        with:
-          bun-version: 1.3.10
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts --filter ./packages/shared --filter ./packages/web
